title: Sapith
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=sapith lightsaber}}
[[File:Firkrann-Sapith-Solari-iw_sbrcrstl_005-KOTOR.png|thumb|right|A Sapith crystal.]]
'''Sapith''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] occasionally used in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] construction. The crystal was excreted by the now extinct [[volice worm]], a creature from the [[Ssi-ruu]]vi homeworld [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]], once every eleven standard years. After the worm's extinction, the only way to find sapith was to excavate it from a fossilized volice. These crystals were shaped like serpent scales, with a complex internal structure.<ref name="Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>

When set in a lightsaber's crystal chamber, sapith generated an intense blade, easier to control than most other blades.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
